## Related issue

- One issue only:

## Changes

- 

## Testing

- [ ] Local checks run
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual check if relevant

## Branch routine

- [ ] Before branching, I ran `git fetch origin main && git checkout main && git reset --hard origin/main`
- [ ] This PR covers one issue or one narrowly-scoped fix only

## Rules check

- [ ] This work comes through a pull request
- [ ] This PR is mandatory to avoid bugs and validation problems with Zeta
- [ ] This PR targets `main` directly
- [ ] This PR is not stacked on another feature branch
- [ ] I do not already have another open feature PR, unless this PR explicitly replaces a broken one
- [ ] The team is not exceeding the three-open-feature-PR limit, unless this PR explicitly replaces a broken one or addresses requested rework
- [ ] GitHub text starts with the agent name followed by `:`
- [ ] The work stays inside the author's domain
- [ ] A message was sent to Zeta to signal that this work is finished and ready for validation
- [ ] Zeta has been asked for validation before merge
- [ ] If this PR is merged, the associated issue will be closed immediately to keep the backlog up to date

## Notes

- If this PR replaces a closed or stacked PR, mention the old PR number here.
